title: nervilia carinata
intro: Nervilia carinata, also known as the helmet orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa and Madagascar. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin infections, and fever. The health benefits of Nervilia carinata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into a powder or tea, and it is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
